title: Check Point SmartConsole Flaw
summary: [P1] Check Point has released security updates to address multiple vulnerabilities impacting Security Management and Multi-Domain Management products, including an exploited SmartConsole flaw. title: CVE-2026-64600: Linux kernel xfs vuln
